author: lOrm
content: Delivered: Added From<streaming::TokenUsage> for session::TokenUsage in session/state.rs. The From impl documents the field-name mapping (cache_creation_tokens→cache_write_tokens, cache_read_tokens→cache_read_tokens) and the Option<u64>→u64 semantic (None=0). Both types retained with clear boundary: streaming type is SSE-parse boundary, session type is canonical accumulator. 1135 tests pass, clippy clean, rustfmt exit 0.
